message:
style(ui): fix inconsistent indentation in session detail label rendering

Correct 11 lines in the colon-split span styling block within app.rs
that were over-indented by one level (16 spaces instead of 12),
bringing them in line with the surrounding else branch.

Also sync beads issue tracker JSONL with latest task metadata updates
from recent triage passes.
